post_text: Northwind shipped its 8,000th unit this quarter. The customer mix is now 60% repeat. More to come.
Thrilled to share Northwind's incredible momentum this quarter — truly game-changing work by an amazing team!

Larkspur dosed its first patient in the Phase 1 study of LRK-204 today. What's notable is the platform's ability to generate clinical candidates against historically intractable targets. Six months from IND to first patient.

Three new utility customers went live on Meridian this quarter. Each one starts as a single-site pilot and most expand within six months. This is the kind of integration that takes utilities from quarterly to monthly planning.
What does a coffee chain expansion look like in a tight consumer market? Hollow Oak just opened its 40th location. All within 200 miles of existing units. The density strategy is the actual story.
Congrats to the Sable team on a huge milestone!
Excited to announce Larkspur's revolutionary new platform!
Worth reading: [Bloomberg piece on logistics automation]
Meridian's grid-balancing API is now in production with three utilities. What this changes: capacity planning shifts from quarterly to monthly.
12 new locations is small. The fact that Hollow Oak picked them all within driving distance of their roastery is the actual story — and the unit economics that follow.
